reviews.review_description: It really straches that "i wanna be inside slope" itch. It kinda feels like how that myth polybios is described lol. Trippy and addictive

reviews.review_title: A fun version of wall sits
reviews.review_description:
What an incredibly simple yet amazing and addictive game! If you can last for 5 minutes, it's a great leg workout of said duration.

Devs, please add hand tracking so that players can be more free and less encumbered while playing! That's the only improvement that initially comes to mind.

I'm excited to see if or how this evolves!
Then use this, addictive as hell.

reviews.review_title: It needs more content but I love it!
